title: Event notifications
excerpt: description: Send messages to Cloudflare Queues when objects in your R2 bucket change. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Event notifications send messages to your [queue](https://developers.cloudflare.com/queues/) when data in your R2 bucket changes. You can consume these messages with a [consumer Worker](https://developers.cloudflare.com/queues/reference/how-queues-works/#create-a-consumer-worker) or [pull over HTTP](https://developers.cloudflare.com/queues/configuration/pull-consumers/) from outside of Cloudflare Workers. * An existing R2 bucket.…
